scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:release && npm run test:test-vault
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/skeleton.test.mjs tests/core.test.mjs tests/timer-state-machine.test.mjs tests/task-rules.test.mjs tests/task-scanner.test.mjs tests/session.test.mjs tests/subtask.test.mjs tests/review.test.mjs tests/dashboard.test.mjs tests/templates.test.mjs tests/extensions.test.mjs
scripts.test:test-vault: npm run build:release && npm run install:test-vault && node --test tests/test-vault.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
